Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(***************************************************************************************

 Fiberwise limits of codomain fibration

 In this file, we study limits of the fiber categories of the codomain fibration (more
 concretely, we study limits in slice categories). We look at terminal objects, binary
 products, and equalizers. For each of these:
 - We characterize limiting cones.
 - We give sufficient conditions for when the desired limits exist.
 - We show that pullback preserves these limits (this follows from the fact that the
   pullback functor is a right adjoint).

 Contents
 1. Preservation of limits by substitution
 2. Fiberwise terminal objects
 3. Fiberwise binary products
 4. Fiberwise equalizers
 5. Fiberwise pullbacks

 ***************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.PullbackConstructions.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fibrations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiber.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiberwise.FiberwiseTerminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiberwise.FiberwiseProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiberwise.FiberwiseEqualizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.FiberCod.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.CodLeftAdjoint.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section CodomainStructure.
  Context {C : category}
          (HC : Pullbacks C).

  Let HD : cleaving (disp_codomain C) := disp_codomain_cleaving HC.

  (** * 1. Preservation of limits by substitution *)
  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_terminal (cod_pb HC f)

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_terminal (cod_pb HC f)

    exact (right_adjoint_preserves_terminal _ (cod_fiber_sigma_adjunction HC f)).
  Qed.

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_binproduct (cod_pb HC f)

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_binproduct (cod_pb HC f)

    exact (right_adjoint_preserves_binproduct _ (cod_fiber_sigma_adjunction HC f)).
  Qed.

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_equalizer (cod_pb HC f)

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_equalizer (cod_pb HC f)

    exact (right_adjoint_preserves_equalizer _ (cod_fiber_sigma_adjunction HC f)).
  Qed.

  (** * 2. Fiberwise terminal objects *)
  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
isTerminal (C / x) yf

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
isTerminal (C / x) yf

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
f:= pr2 yf,, H : z_iso (pr1 yf) x: z_iso (pr1 yf) x
isTerminal (C / x) yf

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
f:= pr2 yf,, H : z_iso (pr1 yf) x: z_iso (pr1 yf) x
zg: C / x
iscontr (C / x ⟦ zg, yf ⟧)

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
f:= pr2 yf,, H : z_iso (pr1 yf) x: z_iso (pr1 yf) x
zg: C / x
isaprop (C / x ⟦ zg, yf ⟧)
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
f:= pr2 yf,, H : z_iso (pr1 yf) x: z_iso (pr1 yf) x
zg: C / x
C / x ⟦ zg, yf ⟧

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
f:= pr2 yf,, H : z_iso (pr1 yf) x: z_iso (pr1 yf) x
zg: C / x
isaprop (C / x ⟦ zg, yf ⟧)
 abstract
        (use invproofirrelevance ;
         intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
         use eq_mor_cod_fib ;
         use (cancel_z_iso _ _ f) ;
         exact (pr2 φ₁ @ !(pr2 φ₂))).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
f:= pr2 yf,, H : z_iso (pr1 yf) x: z_iso (pr1 yf) x
zg: C / x
C / x ⟦ zg, yf ⟧
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
f:= pr2 yf,, H : z_iso (pr1 yf) x: z_iso (pr1 yf) x
zg: C / x
C ⟦ cod_dom zg, cod_dom yf ⟧
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
f:= pr2 yf,, H : z_iso (pr1 yf) x: z_iso (pr1 yf) x
zg: C / x
?g · cod_mor yf = cod_mor zg

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
f:= pr2 yf,, H : z_iso (pr1 yf) x: z_iso (pr1 yf) x
zg: C / x
C ⟦ cod_dom zg, cod_dom yf ⟧
 exact (cod_mor zg · inv_from_z_iso f).
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)
f:= pr2 yf,, H : z_iso (pr1 yf) x: z_iso (pr1 yf) x
zg: C / x
cod_mor zg · inv_from_z_iso f · cod_mor yf =
cod_mor zg
 abstract
          (rewrite assoc' ;
           refine (_ @ id_right _) ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           exact (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
T:= yf,, H : Terminal (C / x): Terminal (C / x)
is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
T:= yf,, H : Terminal (C / x): Terminal (C / x)
φ:= TerminalArrow T (cod_fib_id x): C / x ⟦ cod_fib_id x, T ⟧
is_z_isomorphism (pr2 yf)

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
T:= yf,, H : Terminal (C / x): Terminal (C / x)
φ:= TerminalArrow T (cod_fib_id x): C / x ⟦ cod_fib_id x, T ⟧
C ⟦ x, pr1 yf ⟧
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
T:= yf,, H : Terminal (C / x): Terminal (C / x)
φ:= TerminalArrow T (cod_fib_id x): C / x ⟦ cod_fib_id x, T ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat (pr2 yf) ?g

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
T:= yf,, H : Terminal (C / x): Terminal (C / x)
φ:= TerminalArrow T (cod_fib_id x): C / x ⟦ cod_fib_id x, T ⟧
C ⟦ x, pr1 yf ⟧
 exact (dom_mor φ).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
T:= yf,, H : Terminal (C / x): Terminal (C / x)
φ:= TerminalArrow T (cod_fib_id x): C / x ⟦ cod_fib_id x, T ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat (pr2 yf) (dom_mor φ)
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
T:= yf,, H : Terminal (C / x): Terminal (C / x)
φ:= TerminalArrow T (cod_fib_id x): C / x ⟦ cod_fib_id x, T ⟧
pr2 yf · dom_mor φ = identity (pr1 yf)
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
T:= yf,, H : Terminal (C / x): Terminal (C / x)
φ:= TerminalArrow T (cod_fib_id x): C / x ⟦ cod_fib_id x, T ⟧
dom_mor φ · pr2 yf = identity x

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
T:= yf,, H : Terminal (C / x): Terminal (C / x)
φ:= TerminalArrow T (cod_fib_id x): C / x ⟦ cod_fib_id x, T ⟧
pr2 yf · dom_mor φ = identity (pr1 yf)
 abstract
          (use (maponpaths dom_mor (TerminalArrowEq (T := T) (_ · _ ,, _) (identity _))) ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite !assoc' ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           exact (mor_eq φ)).
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
yf: C / x
H: isTerminal (C / x) yf
T:= yf,, H : Terminal (C / x): Terminal (C / x)
φ:= TerminalArrow T (cod_fib_id x): C / x ⟦ cod_fib_id x, T ⟧
dom_mor φ · pr2 yf = identity x
 abstract
          (exact (mor_eq φ)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
Terminal (C / x)

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
Terminal (C / x)

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
C / x
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
isTerminal (C / x) ?b

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
C / x
 exact (cod_fib_id x).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
isTerminal (C / x) (cod_fib_id x)
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
is_z_isomorphism (pr2 (cod_fib_id x))

      apply identity_is_z_iso.
  Defined.

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
fiberwise_terminal HD

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
fiberwise_terminal HD

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
∏ x : C, Terminal (disp_codomain C)[{x}]
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_terminal
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving (disp_codomain C) HD f)

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
∏ x : C, Terminal (disp_codomain C)[{x}]
 exact codomain_fib_terminal.
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_terminal
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving (disp_codomain C) HD f)
 exact (λ x y, codomain_fib_preserves_terminal).
  Defined.

  (** * 3. Fiberwise binary products *)
  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁ = dom_mor π₂ · cod_mor fy₂

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁ = dom_mor π₂ · cod_mor fy₂

    exact (pr2 π₁ @ !(pr2 π₂)).
  Qed.

  Section ToIsProd.
    Context {x : C}
            {fy₁ fy₂ gp : C/x}
            {π₁ : gp --> fy₁}
            {π₂ : gp --> fy₂}
            (H : isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂))
            {wh : C/x}
            (φq : wh --> fy₁)
            (ψr : wh --> fy₂).

    Let P : Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
      := make_Pullback _ H.

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
P:= make_Pullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂) H: Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
isaprop
  (∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
   fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr)

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
P:= make_Pullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂) H: Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
isaprop
  (∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
   fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr)

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
P:= make_Pullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂) H: Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
   fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr)

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
P:= make_Pullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂) H: Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr
ζ₁ = ζ₂

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
P:= make_Pullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂) H: Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
   x0 · π₁ = φq × x0 · π₂ = ψr)
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
P:= make_Pullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂) H: Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
P:= make_Pullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂) H: Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
   x0 · π₁ = φq × x0 · π₂ = ψr)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
P:= make_Pullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂) H: Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr
x0: C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧
isaprop (x0 · π₁ = φq × x0 · π₂ = ψr)

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
P:= make_Pullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂) H: Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
P:= make_Pullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂) H: Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
dom_mor φq · cod_mor fy₁ = dom_mor ψr · cod_mor fy₂
 abstract
            (exact (mor_eq φq @ !(mor_eq ψr))).
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
P:= make_Pullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂) H: Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
PullbackArrow P (cod_dom wh) (dom_mor φq) (dom_mor ψr)
  isPullback_to_isBinproduct_cod_fib_mor_subproof
· cod_mor gp = cod_mor wh
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           pose (mor_eq π₁) as s ;
           cbn in s ;
           rewrite <- s ;
           rewrite !assoc ;
           rewrite (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 P) ;
           exact (mor_eq φq)).
    Defined.

isPullback_to_isBinproduct_cod_fib_mor · π₁ = φq

fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
∃! fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧, fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
   fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr)
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧, fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧,
   fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr)
 apply (isPullback_to_isBinproduct_cod_fib_unique H).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
∑ fg : C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧, fg · π₁ = φq × fg · π₂ = ψr
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
?pr1 · π₁ = φq
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
(λ _ : ?pr1 · π₁ = φq, ?pr1 · π₂ = ψr) ?pr10

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
C / x ⟦ wh, gp ⟧
 exact (isPullback_to_isBinproduct_cod_fib_mor H φq ψr).
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
isPullback_to_isBinproduct_cod_fib_mor H φq ψr · π₁ =
φq
 apply isPullback_to_isBinproduct_cod_fib_pr1.
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)
wh: C / x
φq: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
ψr: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₂ ⟧
(λ _ : isPullback_to_isBinproduct_cod_fib_mor H φq ψr
       · π₁ = φq,
 isPullback_to_isBinproduct_cod_fib_mor H φq ψr · π₂ =
 ψr) (isPullback_to_isBinproduct_cod_fib_pr1 H φq ψr)
 apply isPullback_to_isBinproduct_cod_fib_pr2.
  Defined.

  Section ToIsPb.
    Context {x : C}
            {fy₁ fy₂ gp : C/x}
            {π₁ : gp --> fy₁}
            {π₂ : gp --> fy₂}
            (H : isBinProduct _ fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂)
            {w : C}
            (φ : w --> cod_dom fy₁)
            (ψ : w --> cod_dom fy₂)
            (s : φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂).

    Let P : BinProduct _ _ _ := make_BinProduct _ _ _ _ _ _ H.

    Let wh : C/x := make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁).

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x

w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧

fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x

s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂

C ⟦ cod_dom wh, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x

w: C

s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂

?g · cod_mor fy₁ = cod_mor wh

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
C ⟦ cod_dom wh, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
 exact φ.
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C

s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
φ · cod_mor fy₁ = cod_mor wh
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

w: C

P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂

C ⟦ cod_dom wh, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ψ · cod_mor fy₂ = cod_mor wh
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite s ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
   hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ)

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
   hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ)

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C

ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
   hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ)

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
ζ₁ = ζ₂

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
   x · pr1 π₁ = φ × x · pr1 π₂ = ψ)
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
   x · pr1 π₁ = φ × x · pr1 π₂ = ψ)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
x0: C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧
isaprop (x0 · pr1 π₁ = φ × x0 · pr1 π₂ = ψ)

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.

w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
pr1 ζ₂ · pr2 gp = ?b
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧

s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
?b = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x

HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
φ · cod_mor fy₁ = φ · cod_mor fy₁

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
(pr1 ζ₁,,
 (maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₁)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
  internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
    (pr1 ζ₁ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
    (pr1 ζ₁ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
    (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
     p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
    (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₁) (cod_mor fy₁) @
     internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
       (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
       (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
       (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
       (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
       (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
    (assoc (pr1 ζ₁) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁))
  :
  (λ ff : C ⟦ pr1 wh, pr1 P ⟧,
   ff · pr2 P = pr2 wh · identity x) (pr1 ζ₁)))
· BinProductPr1 (C / x) P =
(pr1 ζ₂,,
 (maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₂)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
  internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
    (pr1 ζ₂ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
    (pr1 ζ₂ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
    (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
     p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
    (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₂) (cod_mor fy₁) @
     internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
       (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
       (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
       (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
       (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
       (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
    (assoc (pr1 ζ₂) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁))
  :
  (λ ff : C ⟦ pr1 wh, pr1 P ⟧,
   ff · pr2 P = pr2 wh · identity x) (pr1 ζ₂)))
· BinProductPr1 (C / x) P
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
dom_mor
  ((pr1 ζ₁,,
    (maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₁)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
     internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
       (pr1 ζ₁ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
       (pr1 ζ₁ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
       (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
        p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
       (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₁) (cod_mor fy₁) @
        internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
          (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
          (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
          (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
          (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
          (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
       (assoc (pr1 ζ₁) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁))
     :
     (λ ff : C ⟦ pr1 wh, pr1 P ⟧,
      ff · pr2 P = pr2 wh · identity x) (pr1 ζ₁)))
   · BinProductPr1 (C / x) P) =
dom_mor
  ((pr1 ζ₂,,
    (maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₂)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
     internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
       (pr1 ζ₂ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
       (pr1 ζ₂ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
       (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
        p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
       (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₂) (cod_mor fy₁) @
        internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
          (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
          (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
          (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
          (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
          (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
       (assoc (pr1 ζ₂) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁))
     :
     (λ ff : C ⟦ pr1 wh, pr1 P ⟧,
      ff · pr2 P = pr2 wh · identity x) (pr1 ζ₂)))
   · BinProductPr1 (C / x) P)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
dom_mor
  (pr1 ζ₁,,
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₁)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
     (pr1 ζ₁ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
     (pr1 ζ₁ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
      p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
     (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₁) (cod_mor fy₁) @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
        (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
        (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
        (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
        (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
     (assoc (pr1 ζ₁) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁)))
· dom_mor (BinProductPr1 (C / x) P) =
dom_mor
  (pr1 ζ₂,,
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₂)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
     (pr1 ζ₂ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
     (pr1 ζ₂ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
      p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
     (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₂) (cod_mor fy₁) @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
        (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
        (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
        (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
        (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
     (assoc (pr1 ζ₂) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁)))
· dom_mor (BinProductPr1 (C / x) P)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
pr1 ζ₁ · dom_mor π₁ = pr1 ζ₂ · dom_mor π₁

        exact (pr12 ζ₁ @ !(pr12 ζ₂)).
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
(pr1 ζ₁,,
 (maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₁)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
  internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
    (pr1 ζ₁ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
    (pr1 ζ₁ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
    (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
     p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
    (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₁) (cod_mor fy₁) @
     internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
       (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
       (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
       (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
       (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
       (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
    (assoc (pr1 ζ₁) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁))
  :
  (λ ff : C ⟦ pr1 wh, pr1 P ⟧,
   ff · pr2 P = pr2 wh · identity x) (pr1 ζ₁)))
· BinProductPr2 (C / x) P =
(pr1 ζ₂,,
 (maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₂)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
  internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
    (pr1 ζ₂ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
    (pr1 ζ₂ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
    (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
     p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
    (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₂) (cod_mor fy₁) @
     internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
       (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
       (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
       (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
       (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
       (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
    (assoc (pr1 ζ₂) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁))
  :
  (λ ff : C ⟦ pr1 wh, pr1 P ⟧,
   ff · pr2 P = pr2 wh · identity x) (pr1 ζ₂)))
· BinProductPr2 (C / x) P
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
dom_mor
  ((pr1 ζ₁,,
    (maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₁)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
     internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
       (pr1 ζ₁ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
       (pr1 ζ₁ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
       (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
        p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
       (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₁) (cod_mor fy₁) @
        internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
          (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
          (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
          (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
          (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
          (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
       (assoc (pr1 ζ₁) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁))
     :
     (λ ff : C ⟦ pr1 wh, pr1 P ⟧,
      ff · pr2 P = pr2 wh · identity x) (pr1 ζ₁)))
   · BinProductPr2 (C / x) P) =
dom_mor
  ((pr1 ζ₂,,
    (maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₂)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
     internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
       (pr1 ζ₂ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
       (pr1 ζ₂ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
       (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
        p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
       (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₂) (cod_mor fy₁) @
        internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
          (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
          (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
          (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
          (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
          (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
       (assoc (pr1 ζ₂) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁))
     :
     (λ ff : C ⟦ pr1 wh, pr1 P ⟧,
      ff · pr2 P = pr2 wh · identity x) (pr1 ζ₂)))
   · BinProductPr2 (C / x) P)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
dom_mor
  (pr1 ζ₁,,
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₁)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
     (pr1 ζ₁ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
     (pr1 ζ₁ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
      p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
     (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₁) (cod_mor fy₁) @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
        (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
        (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
        (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
        (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
     (assoc (pr1 ζ₁) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁)))
· dom_mor (BinProductPr2 (C / x) P) =
dom_mor
  (pr1 ζ₂,,
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 ζ₂)) (! mor_eq π₁) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
     (pr1 ζ₂ · (dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁))
     (pr1 ζ₂ · dom_mor π₁ · cod_mor fy₁)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
      p = φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
     (maponpaths_2 compose (pr12 ζ₂) (cod_mor fy₁) @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
        (φ · cod_mor fy₁ · identity x)
        (φ · cod_mor fy₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, φ · cod_mor fy₁ = p)
        (idpath (φ · cod_mor fy₁))
        (id_right (φ · cod_mor fy₁)))
     (assoc (pr1 ζ₂) (dom_mor π₁) (cod_mor fy₁)))
· dom_mor (BinProductPr2 (C / x) P)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pr1 gp ⟧,
hk · pr1 π₁ = φ × hk · pr1 π₂ = ψ
pr1 ζ₁ · dom_mor π₂ = pr1 ζ₂ · dom_mor π₂

        exact (pr22 ζ₁ @ !(pr22 ζ₂)).
    Qed.

    Definition isBinProduct_to_isPullback_cod_fib_mor
      : cod_dom wh --> cod_dom gp
      := dom_mor (BinProductArrow _ P φq ψr).

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
isBinProduct_to_isPullback_cod_fib_mor · dom_mor π₁ =
φ

   · BinProductPr1 (C / x) P)

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x

π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂

wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x
isBinProduct_to_isPullback_cod_fib_mor · dom_mor π₁ =
dom_mor (BinProductArrow (C / x) P φq ψr)
· dom_mor (BinProductPr1 (C / x) P)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
P:= make_BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (φ · cod_mor fy₁): C / x

dom_mor (BinProductArrow (C / x) P φq ψr)
· dom_mor (BinProductPr2 (C / x) P)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.
  End ToIsPb.

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
isPullback (fib_isPullback π₁ π₂)

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x

π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
∃! hk : C ⟦ w, cod_dom gp ⟧,
hk · dom_mor π₁ = φ × hk · dom_mor π₂ = ψ

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x

H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, cod_dom gp ⟧,
   hk · dom_mor π₁ = φ × hk · dom_mor π₂ = ψ)

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, cod_dom gp ⟧,
   hk · dom_mor π₁ = φ × hk · dom_mor π₂ = ψ)
 apply (isBinProduct_to_isPullback_cod_fib_unique H).

w: C

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
?pr1 · dom_mor π₁ = φ
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
(λ _ : ?pr1 · dom_mor π₁ = φ, ?pr1 · dom_mor π₂ = ψ)
  ?pr10

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
C ⟦ w, cod_dom gp ⟧
 exact (isBinProduct_to_isPullback_cod_fib_mor H φ ψ s).
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
isBinProduct_to_isPullback_cod_fib_mor H φ ψ s
· dom_mor π₁ = φ
 apply isBinProduct_to_isPullback_cod_fib_pr1.
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂, gp: C / x
π₁: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₁ ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ gp, fy₂ ⟧
H: isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂ gp π₁ π₂
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
ψ: C ⟦ w, cod_dom fy₂ ⟧
s: φ · cod_mor fy₁ = ψ · cod_mor fy₂
(λ _ : isBinProduct_to_isPullback_cod_fib_mor H φ ψ s
       · dom_mor π₁ = φ,
 isBinProduct_to_isPullback_cod_fib_mor H φ ψ s
 · dom_mor π₂ = ψ)
  (isBinProduct_to_isPullback_cod_fib_pr1 H φ ψ s)
 apply isBinProduct_to_isPullback_cod_fib_pr2.
  Defined.

HC: Pullbacks C

x: C
BinProducts (C / x)

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C

  (cod_mor fy₂): Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
C ⟦ P, x ⟧

      exact (PullbackPr1 P · cod_mor fy₁).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x

  (cod_mor fy₂): Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
C / x ⟦ P,, PullbackPr1 P · cod_mor fy₁, fy₁ ⟧
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
P:= HC x (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (cod_mor fy₁)
  (cod_mor fy₂): Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
PullbackPr1 P · pr2 fy₁ =
pr2 (P,, PullbackPr1 P · cod_mor fy₁) · identity x

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id_right ;
         apply idpath).

HC: Pullbacks C

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
P:= HC x (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (cod_mor fy₁)
  (cod_mor fy₂): Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
PullbackPr2 P · pr2 fy₂ =
pr2 (P,, PullbackPr1 P · cod_mor fy₁) · identity x

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite PullbackSqrCommutes ;
         rewrite id_right ;
         apply idpath).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
P:= HC x (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (cod_mor fy₁)
  (cod_mor fy₂): Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
isBinProduct (C / x) fy₁ fy₂
  (P,, PullbackPr1 P · cod_mor fy₁)
  (PullbackPr1 P,,
   codomain_fib_binproducts_subproof x fy₁ fy₂)
  (PullbackPr2 P,,
   codomain_fib_binproducts_subproof0 x fy₁ fy₂)
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
P:= HC x (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (cod_mor fy₁)
  (cod_mor fy₂): Pullback (cod_mor fy₁) (cod_mor fy₂)
isPullback
  (fib_isPullback
     (PullbackPr1 P,,
      codomain_fib_binproducts_subproof x fy₁ fy₂)
     (PullbackPr2 P,,
      codomain_fib_binproducts_subproof0 x fy₁ fy₂))

      apply P.
  Defined.

∏ x : C, BinProducts (disp_codomain C)[{x}]

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_binproduct
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving (disp_codomain C) HD f)

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
∏ x : C, BinProducts (disp_codomain C)[{x}]
 exact codomain_fib_binproducts.
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_binproduct
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving (disp_codomain C) HD f)
 exact (λ x y, codomain_fib_preserves_binproduct).
  Defined.

  (** * 4. Fiberwise equalizers *)
  Section EqualizerCodFib.
    Context {x : C}
            {ee fy₁ fy₂ : C/x}
            (φp ψq : fy₁ --> fy₂)
            (ρr : ee --> fy₁)
            (s : ρr · φp = ρr · ψq).

    Let y₁ : C := cod_dom fy₁.
    Let f₁ : y₁ --> x := cod_mor fy₁.

    Let y₂ : C := cod_dom fy₂.
    Let f₂ : y₂ --> x := cod_mor fy₂.

    Let e : C := cod_dom ee.
    Let m : e --> x := cod_mor ee.

    Let φ : y₁ --> y₂ := dom_mor φp.
    Let ψ : y₁ --> y₂ := dom_mor ψq.
    Let ρ : e --> y₁ := dom_mor ρr.

    Context (s' : ρ · φ = ρ · ψ).

    Section ToEqCodFib.
      Context (H : isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s')
              {wh : C/x}
              (τp : wh --> fy₁)
              (p : τp · φp = τp · ψq).

      Let E : Equalizer φ ψ := make_Equalizer _ _ _ _ H.

      Let w : C := cod_dom wh.
      Let h : w --> x := cod_mor wh.
      Let τ : w --> y₁ := dom_mor τp.

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
isaprop (∑ ζ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, ζ · ρr = τp)

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧

ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
isaprop (∑ ζ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, ζ · ρr = τp)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ ζ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, ζ · ρr = τp)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, ζ · ρr = τp
ζ₁ = ζ₂

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C

y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧

ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ

p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, ζ · ρr = τp
isPredicate (λ x0 : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, x0 · ρr = τp)

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x

s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq

s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧

ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, ζ · ρr = τp
isPredicate (λ x0 : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, x0 · ρr = τp)

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, ζ · ρr = τp
x0: C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧
isaprop (x0 · ρr = τp)

          apply homset_property.
        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, ζ · ρr = τp
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, ζ · ρr = τp
dom_mor (pr1 ζ₁) = dom_mor (pr1 ζ₂)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧

m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧

ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, ζ · ρr = τp
dom_mor (pr1 ζ₁) · EqualizerArrow E =
dom_mor (pr1 ζ₂) · EqualizerArrow E

x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x

y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C

m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧

ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

p: τp · φp = τp · ψq

dom_mor (pr1 ζ₁) · dom_mor ρr

          apply idpath.

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, ζ · ρr = τp
dom_mor (pr1 ζ₂) · dom_mor ρr =
dom_mor (pr1 ζ₂) · EqualizerArrow E

          apply idpath.
      Qed.

ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

p: τp · φp = τp · ψq

h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧

τ · φ = τ · ψ

          abstract
            (refine (_ @ maponpaths dom_mor p @ _) ;
             rewrite comp_in_cod_fib ;
             apply idpath).
        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
EqualizerIn E w τ to_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor_subproof
· cod_mor ee = cod_mor wh
 abstract
            (rewrite <- (mor_eq ρr) ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             etrans ;
             [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
               apply (EqualizerCommutes E)
             | ] ;
             exact (mor_eq τp)).
      Defined.

HC: Pullbacks C

ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
to_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor · ρr = τp

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C

ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧

m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧

ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧

H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x

p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧

to_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor · ρr = τp

ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
dom_mor (to_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor · ρr) = dom_mor τp

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
E:= make_Equalizer φ ψ ρ s' H: Equalizer φ ψ
w:= cod_dom wh: C
h:= cod_mor wh: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
τ:= dom_mor τp: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
dom_mor to_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor · dom_mor ρr =
dom_mor τp

        apply (EqualizerCommutes E).
      Qed.
    End ToEqCodFib.

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'
wh: C / x
τp: C / x ⟦ wh, fy₁ ⟧
p: τp · φp = τp · ψq
(λ φ : C / x ⟦ wh, ee ⟧, φ · ρr = τp)
  (to_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor H τp p)
 exact (to_isEqualizer_cod_fib_comm H τp p).
    Defined.

    Section FromEqCodFib.
      Context (H : isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s)
              {w : C}
              (h : w --> y₁)
              (p : h · φ = h · ψ).

      Let E : Equalizer φp ψq := make_Equalizer _ _ _ _ H.

      Local Definition w' : C/x
        := make_cod_fib_ob (h · f₁).

C / x ⟦ w', fy₁ ⟧

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
C ⟦ cod_dom w', cod_dom fy₁ ⟧
 exact h.
        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
h · cod_mor fy₁ = cod_mor w'
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.

x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, ζ · ρ = h
?b = h · f₁

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, ζ · ρ = h
pr1 ζ₁ · cod_mor ee = ?b

p: h · φ = h · ψ

ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, ζ · ρ = h
cod_mor ee = ?t2

            exact (!(mor_eq ρr)).

ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, ζ · ρ = h
H₁: pr1 ζ₁ · cod_mor ee = h · f₁
cod_mor ee = ?t2

            exact (!(mor_eq ρr)).
          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧

m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, ζ · ρ = h
H₁: pr1 ζ₁ · cod_mor ee = h · f₁
pr1 ζ₂ · (dom_mor ρr · cod_mor fy₁) = h · f₁

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x

ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq

f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C

e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧

ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ

H₂: pr1 ζ₂ · cod_mor ee = h · f₁
ζ₁':= make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 ζ₁) H₁: C / x ⟦ w', ee ⟧
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

p: h · φ = h · ψ

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, ζ · ρ = h
H₁: pr1 ζ₁ · cod_mor ee = h · f₁
H₂: pr1 ζ₂ · cod_mor ee = h · f₁
ζ₁':= make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 ζ₁) H₁: C / x ⟦ w', ee ⟧
ζ₂':= make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 ζ₂) H₂: C / x ⟦ w', ee ⟧
ζ₁' · EqualizerArrow E = ζ₂' · EqualizerArrow E

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, ζ · ρ = h
H₁: pr1 ζ₁ · cod_mor ee = h · f₁
H₂: pr1 ζ₂ · cod_mor ee = h · f₁
ζ₁':= make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 ζ₁) H₁: C / x ⟦ w', ee ⟧
ζ₂':= make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 ζ₂) H₂: C / x ⟦ w', ee ⟧
dom_mor (ζ₁' · EqualizerArrow E) =
dom_mor (ζ₂' · EqualizerArrow E)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ ζ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, ζ · ρ = h
H₁: pr1 ζ₁ · cod_mor ee = h · f₁
H₂: pr1 ζ₂ · cod_mor ee = h · f₁
ζ₁':= make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 ζ₁) H₁: C / x ⟦ w', ee ⟧
ζ₂':= make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 ζ₂) H₂: C / x ⟦ w', ee ⟧
dom_mor ζ₁' · dom_mor (EqualizerArrow E) =
dom_mor ζ₂' · dom_mor (EqualizerArrow E)

        exact (pr2 ζ₁ @ !(pr2 ζ₂)).
      Qed.

      Definition from_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor
        : w --> e
        := pr1 (EqualizerIn E w' h' p').

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧

m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
from_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor · ρ = h

y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C

φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
from_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor · ρ =
dom_mor (EqualizerIn E w' h' p' · EqualizerArrow E)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
E:= make_Equalizer φp ψq ρr s H: Equalizer φp ψq
from_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor · ρ =
dom_mor (EqualizerIn E w' h' p')
· dom_mor (EqualizerArrow E)

        apply idpath.
      Qed.
    End FromEqCodFib.

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
isEqualizer φ ψ ρ s'

m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧

ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
∃! φ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, φ · ρ = h

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x

ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧

m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C

p: h · φ = h · ψ
isaprop (∑ φ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, φ · ρ = h)

 apply (from_isEqualizer_cod_fib_unique H).

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
(λ φ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, φ · ρ = h) ?pr1

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
C ⟦ w, e ⟧
 exact (from_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor H h p).
        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
x: C
ee, fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
ρr: C / x ⟦ ee, fy₁ ⟧
s: ρr · φp = ρr · ψq
y₁:= cod_dom fy₁: C
f₁:= cod_mor fy₁: C ⟦ y₁, x ⟧
y₂:= cod_dom fy₂: C
f₂:= cod_mor fy₂: C ⟦ y₂, x ⟧
e:= cod_dom ee: C
m:= cod_mor ee: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
φ:= dom_mor φp: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ψ:= dom_mor ψq: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ρ:= dom_mor ρr: C ⟦ e, y₁ ⟧
s': ρ · φ = ρ · ψ
H: isEqualizer φp ψq ρr s
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y₁ ⟧
p: h · φ = h · ψ
(λ φ : C ⟦ w, e ⟧, φ · ρ = h)
  (from_isEqualizer_cod_fib_mor H h p)
 exact (from_isEqualizer_cod_fib_comm H h p).
    Defined.
  End EqualizerCodFib.

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
x: C
Equalizers (C / x)

E:= H (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (dom_mor φp)
  (dom_mor ψq): Equalizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
Equalizer φp ψq

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
E:= H (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (dom_mor φp)
  (dom_mor ψq): Equalizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
C ⟦ E, x ⟧

      exact (EqualizerArrow E · cod_mor fy₁).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
E:= H (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (dom_mor φp)
  (dom_mor ψq): Equalizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
C / x ⟦ E,, EqualizerArrow E · cod_mor fy₁, fy₁ ⟧
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
E:= H (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (dom_mor φp)
  (dom_mor ψq): Equalizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
EqualizerArrow E · pr2 fy₁ =
pr2 (E,, EqualizerArrow E · cod_mor fy₁) · identity x

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id_right ;
         apply idpath).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
E:= H (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (dom_mor φp)
  (dom_mor ψq): Equalizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
(EqualizerArrow E,,
 codomain_fib_equalizer_subproof H x fy₁ fy₂ φp ψq)
· φp =
(EqualizerArrow E,,
 codomain_fib_equalizer_subproof H x fy₁ fy₂ φp ψq)
· ψq
 abstract
        (use eq_mor_cod_fib ;
         rewrite !comp_in_cod_fib ;
         cbn ;
         apply EqualizerEqAr).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
E:= H (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (dom_mor φp)
  (dom_mor ψq): Equalizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
isEqualizer φp ψq
  (EqualizerArrow E,,
   codomain_fib_equalizer_subproof H x fy₁ fy₂ φp ψq)
  (codomain_fib_equalizer_subproof0 H x fy₁ fy₂ φp ψq)
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
E:= H (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (dom_mor φp)
  (dom_mor ψq): Equalizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
dom_mor
  (EqualizerArrow E,,
   codomain_fib_equalizer_subproof H x fy₁ fy₂ φp ψq)
· dom_mor φp =
dom_mor
  (EqualizerArrow E,,
   codomain_fib_equalizer_subproof H x fy₁ fy₂ φp ψq)
· dom_mor ψq
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
E:= H (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (dom_mor φp)
  (dom_mor ψq): Equalizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
isEqualizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
  (dom_mor
     (EqualizerArrow E,,
      codomain_fib_equalizer_subproof H x fy₁ fy₂ φp
        ψq)) ?s'

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
x: C
