E:= H (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (dom_mor φp)
  (dom_mor ψq): Equalizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
dom_mor
  (EqualizerArrow E,,
   codomain_fib_equalizer_subproof H x fy₁ fy₂ φp ψq)
· dom_mor φp =
dom_mor
  (EqualizerArrow E,,
   codomain_fib_equalizer_subproof H x fy₁ fy₂ φp ψq)
· dom_mor ψq
 apply EqualizerEqAr.
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
x: C
fy₁, fy₂: C / x
φp, ψq: C / x ⟦ fy₁, fy₂ ⟧
E:= H (cod_dom fy₁) (cod_dom fy₂) (dom_mor φp)
  (dom_mor ψq): Equalizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
isEqualizer (dom_mor φp) (dom_mor ψq)
  (dom_mor
     (EqualizerArrow E,,
      codomain_fib_equalizer_subproof H x fy₁ fy₂ φp
        ψq)) (EqualizerEqAr E)
 exact (isEqualizer_Equalizer E).
  Defined.

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
fiberwise_equalizers HD

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
fiberwise_equalizers HD

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
∏ x : C, Equalizers (disp_codomain C)[{x}]
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_equalizer
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving (disp_codomain C) HD f)

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
∏ x : C, Equalizers (disp_codomain C)[{x}]
 exact (codomain_fib_equalizer H).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
H: Equalizers C
∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_equalizer
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving (disp_codomain C) HD f)
 exact (λ x y, codomain_fib_preserves_equalizer).
  Defined.

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
T: Terminal C
fiberwise_equalizers HD

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
T: Terminal C
fiberwise_equalizers HD

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
T: Terminal C
Equalizers C

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
T: Terminal C
Pullbacks C
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
T: Terminal C
Terminal C

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
T: Terminal C
Pullbacks C
 exact HC.
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
T: Terminal C
Terminal C
 exact T.
  Defined.

  (** 5. Fiberwise pullbacks *)
  Section PullbackSlice.
    Context {y : C}
            {xf₁ xf₂ xf₃ : C / y}
            (hp₁ : xf₁ --> xf₃)
            (hp₂ : xf₂ --> xf₃)
            {pbs : C/y}
            (πs₁ : pbs --> xf₁)
            (πs₂ : pbs --> xf₂).

    Let x₁ : C := cod_dom xf₁.
    Let x₂ : C := cod_dom xf₂.
    Let x₃ : C := cod_dom xf₃.

    Let f₁ : x₁ --> y := cod_mor xf₁.
    Let f₂ : x₂ --> y := cod_mor xf₂.
    Let f₃ : x₃ --> y := cod_mor xf₃.

    Let h₁ : x₁ --> x₃ := dom_mor hp₁.
    Let h₂ : x₂ --> x₃ := dom_mor hp₂.

    Let pb : C := cod_dom pbs.
    Let k : pb --> y := cod_mor pbs.

    Let π₁ : pb --> x₁ := dom_mor πs₁.
    Let π₂ : pb --> x₂ := dom_mor πs₂.

    Context (p : π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂)
            (ps : πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂).

    Section ToUMP.
      Context (H : isPullback p)
              {wφ : C/y}
              (ζr₁ : wφ --> xf₁)
              (ζr₂ : wφ --> xf₂)
              (q : ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂).

      Let P : Pullback h₁ h₂ := make_Pullback _ H.
      Let w : C := cod_dom wφ.
      Let φ : w --> y := cod_mor wφ.

      Let ζ₁ : w --> x₁ := dom_mor ζr₁.
      Let ζ₂ : w --> x₂ := dom_mor ζr₂.

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
   hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂)

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
   hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
   hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂
φ₁ = φ₂

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
   x · πs₁ = ζr₁ × x · πs₂ = ζr₂)

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
   x · πs₁ = ζr₁ × x · πs₂ = ζr₂)

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂
x: C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧
isaprop (x · πs₁ = ζr₁ × x · πs₂ = ζr₂)

          apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y

hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧

x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C

f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧

h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂

φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧

hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂
pr11 φ₁ = pr11 φ₂

P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂
pr1 (pr1 φ₂ · πs₂) = pr11 φ₂ · π₂

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂
pr11 φ₁ · π₂ = pr1 (pr1 φ₁ · πs₂)
 exact (!(comp_in_cod_fib _ _)).
          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂
pr1 (pr1 φ₂ · πs₂) = pr11 φ₂ · π₂
 exact (comp_in_cod_fib _ _).
      Qed.

h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
C ⟦ cod_dom wφ, x₂ ⟧
 exact ζ₂.
          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
 abstract
              (refine (_ @ maponpaths dom_mor q @ _) ;
               rewrite comp_in_cod_fib ;
               apply idpath).
        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
P:= make_Pullback p H: Pullback h₁ h₂
w:= cod_dom wφ: C
φ:= cod_mor wφ: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ζ₁:= dom_mor ζr₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂:= dom_mor ζr₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
PullbackArrow P (cod_dom wφ) ζ₁ ζ₂
  to_is_pullback_slice_mor_subproof · cod_mor pbs =
cod_mor wφ
 abstract
            (rewrite <- (mor_eq πs₁) ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             rewrite (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 P) ;
             exact (mor_eq ζr₁)).
      Defined.

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y

hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧

H: isPullback p
isPullback ps

HC: Pullbacks C

x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
isPullback ps

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
∃! hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
   hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂)

hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧

x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C

f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧

π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧

ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C / y ⟦ wφ, pbs ⟧,
   hk · πs₁ = ζr₁ × hk · πs₂ = ζr₂)
 apply (to_is_pullback_slice_mor_unique H).

HC: Pullbacks C

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y

π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧

 apply to_is_pullback_slice_mor_pr1.
        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback p
wφ: C / y
ζr₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζr₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
q: ζr₁ · hp₁ = ζr₂ · hp₂
(λ _ : to_is_pullback_slice_mor H ζr₁ ζr₂ q · πs₁ =
       ζr₁,
 to_is_pullback_slice_mor H ζr₁ ζr₂ q · πs₂ = ζr₂)
  (to_is_pullback_slice_mor_pr1 H ζr₁ ζr₂ q)
 apply to_is_pullback_slice_mor_pr2.
    Defined.

    Section FromUMP.
      Context (H : isPullback ps)
              {w : C}
              (ζ₁ : w --> x₁)
              (ζ₂ : w --> x₂)
              (q : ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂).

      Let P : Pullback hp₁ hp₂ := make_Pullback _ H.
      Let wφ : C/y := make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁).

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧

x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C

f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧

h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧

w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧

q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂

 abstract
            (apply idpath).
      Defined.

      Let ψ : wφ --> xf₁ := from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁.

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ζ₂ · cod_mor xf₂ = cod_mor wφ
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             refine (_ @ maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (mor_eq hp₁)) ;
             refine (maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (!(mor_eq hp₂)) @ _) ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             exact (!q)).
      Defined.

      Let ψ' : wφ --> xf₂ := from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂.

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂

πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
dom_mor (ψ · hp₁) = dom_mor (ψ' · hp₂)

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂)

f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧

h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂

x: C ⟦ w, pb ⟧
isaprop (x · π₁ = ζ₁ × x · π₂ = ζ₂)

          apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.

xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₁ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₂ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₁) ?p · πs₁ =
make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₂) ?p0 · πs₁

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧

πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧

x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C

f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧

h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂

H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂

make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₁) ?p · πs₂ =
make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₂) ?p0 · πs₂

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₁ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₁ · cod_mor pbs = ζ₁ · f₁

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₁ · (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁) = ζ₁ · f₁

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₁ · dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁ = ζ₁ · f₁

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
ζ₁ · cod_mor xf₁ = ζ₁ · f₁

          apply idpath.
        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₂ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₂ · cod_mor pbs = ζ₁ · f₁

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₂ · (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁) = ζ₁ · f₁

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₂ · dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁ = ζ₁ · f₁

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
ζ₁ · cod_mor xf₁ = ζ₁ · f₁

          apply idpath.
        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₁)
  (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧)
     (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
     (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧, pr1 φ₁ · p = ζ₁ · f₁)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (pr1 φ₁ · (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁))
        (pr1 φ₁ · dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = ζ₁ · f₁)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧, z · cod_mor xf₁)
           (pr12 φ₁) @ idpath (ζ₁ · f₁))
        (assoc (pr1 φ₁) (dom_mor πs₁) (cod_mor xf₁)))
     (cod_mor pbs) (mor_eq πs₁)
   :
   pr1 φ₁ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ) · πs₁ =
make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₂)
  (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧)
     (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
     (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧, pr1 φ₂ · p = ζ₁ · f₁)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (pr1 φ₂ · (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁))
        (pr1 φ₂ · dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = ζ₁ · f₁)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧, z · cod_mor xf₁)
           (pr12 φ₂) @ idpath (ζ₁ · f₁))
        (assoc (pr1 φ₂) (dom_mor πs₁) (cod_mor xf₁)))
     (cod_mor pbs) (mor_eq πs₁)
   :
   pr1 φ₂ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ) · πs₁
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₁)
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧)
        (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧,
         pr1 φ₁ · p = ζ₁ · f₁)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (pr1 φ₁ · (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁))
           (pr1 φ₁ · dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = ζ₁ · f₁)
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧, z · cod_mor xf₁)
              (pr12 φ₁) @ idpath (ζ₁ · f₁))
           (assoc (pr1 φ₁) (dom_mor πs₁) (cod_mor xf₁)))
        (cod_mor pbs) (mor_eq πs₁)
      :
      pr1 φ₁ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ) · πs₁) =
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₂)
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧)
        (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧,
         pr1 φ₂ · p = ζ₁ · f₁)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (pr1 φ₂ · (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁))
           (pr1 φ₂ · dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = ζ₁ · f₁)
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧, z · cod_mor xf₁)
              (pr12 φ₂) @ idpath (ζ₁ · f₁))
           (assoc (pr1 φ₂) (dom_mor πs₁) (cod_mor xf₁)))
        (cod_mor pbs) (mor_eq πs₁)
      :
      pr1 φ₂ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ) · πs₁)

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₁ · dom_mor πs₁ = pr1 φ₂ · dom_mor πs₁

          exact (pr12 φ₁ @ !pr12 φ₂).
        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₁)
  (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧)
     (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
     (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧, pr1 φ₁ · p = ζ₁ · f₁)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (pr1 φ₁ · (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁))
        (pr1 φ₁ · dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = ζ₁ · f₁)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧, z · cod_mor xf₁)
           (pr12 φ₁) @ idpath (ζ₁ · f₁))
        (assoc (pr1 φ₁) (dom_mor πs₁) (cod_mor xf₁)))
     (cod_mor pbs) (mor_eq πs₁)
   :
   pr1 φ₁ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ) · πs₂ =
make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₂)
  (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧)
     (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
     (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧, pr1 φ₂ · p = ζ₁ · f₁)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (pr1 φ₂ · (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁))
        (pr1 φ₂ · dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = ζ₁ · f₁)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧, z · cod_mor xf₁)
           (pr12 φ₂) @ idpath (ζ₁ · f₁))
        (assoc (pr1 φ₂) (dom_mor πs₁) (cod_mor xf₁)))
     (cod_mor pbs) (mor_eq πs₁)
   :
   pr1 φ₂ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ) · πs₂
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₁)
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧)
        (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧,
         pr1 φ₁ · p = ζ₁ · f₁)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (pr1 φ₁ · (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁))
           (pr1 φ₁ · dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = ζ₁ · f₁)
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧, z · cod_mor xf₁)
              (pr12 φ₁) @ idpath (ζ₁ · f₁))
           (assoc (pr1 φ₁) (dom_mor πs₁) (cod_mor xf₁)))
        (cod_mor pbs) (mor_eq πs₁)
      :
      pr1 φ₁ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ) · πs₂) =
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor (pr1 φ₂)
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧)
        (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
        (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom pbs, y ⟧,
         pr1 φ₂ · p = ζ₁ · f₁)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (pr1 φ₂ · (dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁))
           (pr1 φ₂ · dom_mor πs₁ · cod_mor xf₁)
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = ζ₁ · f₁)
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧, z · cod_mor xf₁)
              (pr12 φ₂) @ idpath (ζ₁ · f₁))
           (assoc (pr1 φ₂) (dom_mor πs₁) (cod_mor xf₁)))
        (cod_mor pbs) (mor_eq πs₁)
      :
      pr1 φ₂ · cod_mor pbs = cod_mor wφ) · πs₂)

          
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂
pr1 φ₁ · dom_mor πs₂ = pr1 φ₂ · dom_mor πs₂

          exact (pr22 φ₁ @ !pr22 φ₂).
      Qed.

      Definition from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help
        : wφ --> pbs
        := PullbackArrow P _ ψ ψ' r.

      Definition from_is_pullback_slice_mor
        : w --> pb
        := dom_mor from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help.

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧

h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧

π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
from_is_pullback_slice_mor · π₁ = ζ₁

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
from_is_pullback_slice_mor · π₁ =
dom_mor (PullbackArrow P wφ ψ ψ' r · PullbackPr1 P)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
from_is_pullback_slice_mor · π₁ =
dom_mor (PullbackArrow P wφ ψ ψ' r)
· dom_mor (PullbackPr1 P)

        apply idpath.
      Qed.

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y

hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧

πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧

x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧

h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂

dom_mor (PullbackArrow P wφ ψ ψ' r · PullbackPr2 P)

        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
P:= make_Pullback ps H: Pullback hp₁ hp₂
wφ:= make_cod_fib_ob (ζ₁ · f₁): C / y
ψ:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₁: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₁ ⟧
ψ':= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help₂: C / y ⟦ wφ, xf₂ ⟧
r:= from_is_pullback_slice_mor_help_eq: ψ · hp₁ = ψ' · hp₂
from_is_pullback_slice_mor · π₂ =
dom_mor (PullbackArrow P wφ ψ ψ' r)
· dom_mor (PullbackPr2 P)

        apply idpath.
      Qed.
    End FromUMP.

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
isPullback p

h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧
pbs: C / y
πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
∃! hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧

πs₁: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₁ ⟧
πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧
x₁:= cod_dom xf₁: C
x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C
f₁:= cod_mor xf₁: C ⟦ x₁, y ⟧
f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
pb:= cod_dom pbs: C
k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧

π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂

ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb ⟧, hk · π₁ = ζ₁ × hk · π₂ = ζ₂)

HC: Pullbacks C

(λ _ : ?pr1 · π₁ = ζ₁, ?pr1 · π₂ = ζ₂) ?pr10

HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C

hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧

x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C

f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧

h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧

w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
from_is_pullback_slice_mor H ζ₁ ζ₂ q · π₁ = ζ₁
 apply from_is_pullback_slice_mor_pr1.
        
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
y: C
xf₁, xf₂, xf₃: C / y
hp₁: C / y ⟦ xf₁, xf₃ ⟧
hp₂: C / y ⟦ xf₂, xf₃ ⟧

πs₂: C / y ⟦ pbs, xf₂ ⟧

x₂:= cod_dom xf₂: C
x₃:= cod_dom xf₃: C

f₂:= cod_mor xf₂: C ⟦ x₂, y ⟧
f₃:= cod_mor xf₃: C ⟦ x₃, y ⟧
h₁:= dom_mor hp₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
h₂:= dom_mor hp₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

k:= cod_mor pbs: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor πs₁: C ⟦ pb, x₁ ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor πs₂: C ⟦ pb, x₂ ⟧
p: π₁ · h₁ = π₂ · h₂
ps: πs₁ · hp₁ = πs₂ · hp₂
H: isPullback ps
w: C
ζ₁: C ⟦ w, x₁ ⟧
ζ₂: C ⟦ w, x₂ ⟧
q: ζ₁ · h₁ = ζ₂ · h₂
(λ _ : from_is_pullback_slice_mor H ζ₁ ζ₂ q · π₁ = ζ₁,
 from_is_pullback_slice_mor H ζ₁ ζ₂ q · π₂ = ζ₂)
  (from_is_pullback_slice_mor_pr1 H ζ₁ ζ₂ q)
 apply from_is_pullback_slice_mor_pr2.
    Defined.
  End PullbackSlice.

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
Pullbacks (C / y)

  
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
Pullbacks (C / y)

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
f₁, f₂, f₃: C / y
h₁: C / y ⟦ f₂, f₁ ⟧
h₂: C / y ⟦ f₃, f₁ ⟧
Pullback h₁ h₂

    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
f₁, f₂, f₃: C / y
h₁: C / y ⟦ f₂, f₁ ⟧
h₂: C / y ⟦ f₃, f₁ ⟧
pb:= PB (cod_dom f₁) (cod_dom f₂) (cod_dom f₃)
  (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂): Pullback (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂)
Pullback h₁ h₂

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)

y: C

  (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂): Pullback (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂)
C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
 exact (PullbackPr1 pb · cod_mor f₂).

⟦ cod_dom
    (make_cod_fib_ob (PullbackPr1 pb · cod_mor f₂)),

 apply PullbackPr1.

HC: Pullbacks C

  (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂): Pullback (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂)
PullbackPr1 pb · cod_mor f₂ =
cod_mor
  (make_cod_fib_ob (PullbackPr1 pb · cod_mor f₂))
 abstract
          (apply idpath).

C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
f₁, f₂, f₃: C / y
h₁: C / y ⟦ f₂, f₁ ⟧
h₂: C / y ⟦ f₃, f₁ ⟧
pb:= PB (cod_dom f₁) (cod_dom f₂) (cod_dom f₃)
  (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂): Pullback (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂)
C
⟦ cod_dom
    (make_cod_fib_ob (PullbackPr1 pb · cod_mor f₂)),
cod_dom f₃ ⟧
 apply PullbackPr2.
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
f₁, f₂, f₃: C / y
h₁: C / y ⟦ f₂, f₁ ⟧
h₂: C / y ⟦ f₃, f₁ ⟧
pb:= PB (cod_dom f₁) (cod_dom f₂) (cod_dom f₃)
  (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂): Pullback (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂)
PullbackPr2 pb · cod_mor f₃ =
cod_mor
  (make_cod_fib_ob (PullbackPr1 pb · cod_mor f₂))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite <- (mor_eq h₁) ;
           rewrite <- (mor_eq h₂) ;
           rewrite !assoc ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           exact (!(PullbackSqrCommutes pb))).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
f₁, f₂, f₃: C / y
h₁: C / y ⟦ f₂, f₁ ⟧
h₂: C / y ⟦ f₃, f₁ ⟧
pb:= PB (cod_dom f₁) (cod_dom f₂) (cod_dom f₃)
  (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂): Pullback (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂)
make_cod_fib_mor (PullbackPr1 pb)
  (codomain_fiberwise_pullbacks_subproof PB y f₁ f₂ f₃
     h₁ h₂) · h₁ =
make_cod_fib_mor (PullbackPr2 pb)
  (codomain_fiberwise_pullbacks_subproof0 PB y f₁ f₂
     f₃ h₁ h₂) · h₂
 abstract
        (use eq_mor_cod_fib ;
         rewrite !comp_in_cod_fib ;
         cbn ;
         exact (PullbackSqrCommutes pb)).
    
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
f₁, f₂, f₃: C / y
h₁: C / y ⟦ f₂, f₁ ⟧
h₂: C / y ⟦ f₃, f₁ ⟧
pb:= PB (cod_dom f₁) (cod_dom f₂) (cod_dom f₃)
  (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂): Pullback (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂)
isPullback
  (codomain_fiberwise_pullbacks_subproof1 PB y f₁ f₂
     f₃ h₁ h₂)
 
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
f₁, f₂, f₃: C / y
h₁: C / y ⟦ f₂, f₁ ⟧
h₂: C / y ⟦ f₃, f₁ ⟧
pb:= PB (cod_dom f₁) (cod_dom f₂) (cod_dom f₃)
  (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂): Pullback (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂)
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor (PullbackPr1 pb)
     (codomain_fiberwise_pullbacks_subproof PB y f₁ f₂
        f₃ h₁ h₂)) · dom_mor h₁ =
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor (PullbackPr2 pb)
     (codomain_fiberwise_pullbacks_subproof0 PB y f₁
        f₂ f₃ h₁ h₂)) · dom_mor h₂
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
f₁, f₂, f₃: C / y
h₁: C / y ⟦ f₂, f₁ ⟧
h₂: C / y ⟦ f₃, f₁ ⟧
pb:= PB (cod_dom f₁) (cod_dom f₂) (cod_dom f₃)
  (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂): Pullback (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂)
isPullback ?p

      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
f₁, f₂, f₃: C / y
h₁: C / y ⟦ f₂, f₁ ⟧
h₂: C / y ⟦ f₃, f₁ ⟧
pb:= PB (cod_dom f₁) (cod_dom f₂) (cod_dom f₃)
  (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂): Pullback (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂)
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor (PullbackPr1 pb)
     (codomain_fiberwise_pullbacks_subproof PB y f₁ f₂
        f₃ h₁ h₂)) · dom_mor h₁ =
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor (PullbackPr2 pb)
     (codomain_fiberwise_pullbacks_subproof0 PB y f₁
        f₂ f₃ h₁ h₂)) · dom_mor h₂
 exact (PullbackSqrCommutes pb).
      
C: category
HC: Pullbacks C
HD:= disp_codomain_cleaving HC: cleaving (disp_codomain C)
PB: Pullbacks C
y: C
f₁, f₂, f₃: C / y
h₁: C / y ⟦ f₂, f₁ ⟧
h₂: C / y ⟦ f₃, f₁ ⟧
pb:= PB (cod_dom f₁) (cod_dom f₂) (cod_dom f₃)
  (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂): Pullback (dom_mor h₁) (dom_mor h₂)
isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes pb)
 exact (isPullback_Pullback pb).
  Defined.
End CodomainStructure.
